overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through Night City during a severe dust storm with orange atmospheric haze, navigating from an open intersection through covered streets and up to an elevated NCART station platform while observing NPC interactions.

scene_state.functional_zone: dusty urban intersection with traffic control

events.description: beginning to cross the street moving forward through the intersection
vehicle passes through the intersection in the heavy dust haze

agents.ego_description: walking across the dusty intersection, navigating through low visibility conditions with dust storm obscuring views

notable_agents.action: car driving slowly through the dusty intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: tall metal pole with traffic signals and lights barely visible through haze
elevated highway structure looming in the distance through orange dust
modern curved street lamp post with dual lights

segments.scene_description: The player begins at a dusty urban intersection during a severe dust storm with orange atmospheric haze. Walking forward across the asphalt road, the player passes a traffic light pole while a vehicle drives through the intersection. The overpass structure is visible in the distance through the thick haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered street under overpass approaching transit station

events.description: entering darker shaded area under the overpass structure reducing visibility
emerging from underpass into station area with visible neon signage and artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along the road under the overpass, approaching the NCART station entrance while passing other pedestrians

entered.detail: black traffic control box mounted on a pole at the roadside
large illuminated advertisement screen with red and blue graphics glowing in the haze
green neon sign for Night City Area Rapid Transit station entrance

segments.scene_description: Moving under the overpass, the lighting dims significantly as the player enters a sheltered area. The traffic light pole moves closer on the left while a neon billboard and NCART station sign become visible ahead. The player emerges from the underpass into the station area with artificial neon lighting cutting through the dust.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated NCART station platform with commercial signage

events.description: ascending concrete stairs to the elevated platform level
reaching the top of stairs and entering the main station platform area with shops

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs to the elevated platform, passing other pedestrians and walking past neon-lit shops and billboards

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking up the stairs ahead of the player

entered.detail: concrete staircase with metal railings leading up to the elevated platform
large illuminated sign advertising food with bold red text and imagery
automated vending machines with glowing blue and red displays under a canopy
multiple stacked digital screens showing various advertisements and content

segments.scene_description: The player ascends the stairs to the elevated NCART platform, transitioning from natural to artificial lighting. At the top, the platform features commercial elements including a prominent Slaughterhouse food billboard, vending kiosks with glowing displays, and digital advertisement arrays. Other pedestrians move along the platform in various directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with NPC gathering and digital displays

events.description: slowing down and approaching a group of NPCs having an interaction on the platform
NPCs seen interacting closely, with one taking a photograph of another while a third observes

agents.ego_description: approaching a group of three NPCs on the platform, observing one taking a photo while another holds a weapon and a third watches

notable_agents.action: person in tank top taking a photo or video with a handheld device of another person
person holding a baseball bat standing guard nearby the group

entered.detail: large concrete column supporting the overhead station structure
scattered newspaper sheets and debris on the ground near the NPC group

segments.scene_description: Walking along the elevated platform, the player approaches a group of three NPCs gathered near a support pillar. The area has littered newspapers on the ground. The player slows to observe the interaction where one NPC takes a photo of another while a third stands by with a bat. Digital billboards and the Slaughterhouse sign remain visible in the background as the scene ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a hazy, dust-choked urban intersection up into the neon-lit environment of an elevated transit station. It begins by crossing an asphalt road amidst a severe orange dust storm, passing a traffic light as a vehicle navigates the thick atmospheric haze toward a distant overpass. As the camera moves under the overpass, the natural light dims significantly before emerging into a sheltered station area where artificial neon signs begin to cut through the dust. The scene then ascends a set of stairs, transitioning from the street level to an elevated NCART platform filled with glowing vending kiosks and prominent digital advertisements for Slaughterhouse. Finally, the camera glides along the littered platform toward a group of NPCs gathered by a support pillar, observing a character taking a photo while billboards flicker in the background.
